design_philosophy: A bold, high-contrast, confidence-inspiring layout mimicking the clarity of road signs. The goal is lead capture (calls and visits) for a local driving school. Focus on large typography, high-visibility CTA buttons, and distinct content sections with asymmetrical grids for visual interest.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-slate-900
hierarchy.label: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-amber-600

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. Sections should have py-24 or py-32. Internal card padding should be p-8 to p-12.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: For the 'Services' section, use a bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6). Combine span-4 and span-8 to create dynamic asymmetrical blocks.

header.style: Glassmorphism navigation. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200. Sticky top-0 z-50.
header.behavior: Logo on left, navigation links centered (desktop), 'Call Now' CTA on right with primary color.

hero.style: Side-by-side or split layout. Left side: High-impact typography with primary CTA. Right side: Large rounded image of a scooter rider.
hero.cta: Large button, bg-[#FFB800] text-black font-bold hover:bg-[#F59E0B] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] hover:translate-y-1 hover:shadow-none transition-all.

services.style: High-contrast bento cards. bg-white border-2 border-slate-900 shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#0F172A]. Rounded-2xl.
services.items: 1. Basic 2-Wheeler Riding, 2. License Preparation. Use lucide-react icons (Bike, FileText).

testimonials.style: Marquee or grid of clean cards. Quote text in italics, customer name bold, 5-star icons.
testimonials.background: Use a subtle patterned or soft-colored section background (bg-slate-50).

contact.style: Split section: Contact details (Address, Phone) on one side, Google Map iframe on the other.

images.description: Woman riding an electric scooter on a sunny street, conveying confidence and ease.
Man standing with a red Vespa scooter holding a helmet, friendly instructor vibe.
Person riding a white scooter, used to illustrate basic riding courses.
Asphalt texture with yellow road lines for decorative background accents.

seo_and_content.meta_title: Learn and Drive | Top 2-Wheeler Driving School in Khajaguda, Hyderabad
seo_and_content.meta_description: Master 2-wheeler riding with Learn and Drive. Expert instructors, basic riding courses, and complete driving license preparation in Khajaguda, Hyderabad.
seo_and_content.keywords: 2-wheeler driving school, scooty driving classes, driving license preparation, Hyderabad, Khajaguda, Learn and Drive
seo_and_content.address: Road, opp. ASBL, Janmabhoomi Colony, Chaitanya Enclave, Khajaguda, Makthakousarali, Telangana 500104

testing.requirements: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and key navigation links must include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use a pure React + Tailwind architecture. No heavy backend dependencies.
Ensure standard HTML5 semantic tags are used (header, section, footer).
Include a React-based smooth scrolling for navigation links.
Integrate Lucide React for consistent iconography (stars, map pins, phones).
Embed the Google Map iframe provided in the problem statement inside the Contact section.
Follow the specific bold typography sizing and asymmetrical grid styles outlined in the guidelines.
